allow:
Bash(git -C /Users/hherb/src/bmlibrarian commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update README.md to reflect current project state \(02/2026\)

- Update codebase statistics: 728 files, 1,390 classes, 9,671 functions, ~211K LOC
- Add Paper Reviewer Lab as latest feature \(11-step unified assessment\)
- Add Systematic Review Agent, Europe PMC import, PubMed Search Lab
- Add Semantic Chunking, LLM Provider Abstraction, User Authentication
- Replace all Flet references with PySide6/Qt
- Replace <repository-url> placeholders with actual GitHub URL
- Remove stale granular changelog, replace with concise project status
- Remove emoji from headings and bullet points
- Fix outdated agent count \(13+ → 15+\) and test coverage stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/hherb/src/bmlibrarian commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix model list population in Paper Reviewer Lab input panel

Replace removed get_models_list\(\) with direct ollama.list\(\) call
and provide proper default model for get_model\(\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add TransparencyAgent for offline undisclosed bias risk detection

Implement comprehensive transparency assessment system that detects
undisclosed bias risk in biomedical papers using local Ollama LLM
analysis. Evaluates funding disclosure, COI statements, data
availability, trial registration, and author contributions with a
0-10 composite score and risk classification.

New components:
- TransparencyAgent \(BaseAgent subclass\) with pattern matching + LLM
- Industry funder detection via curated company list and regex patterns
- Trial registry ID extraction for 15 registry formats
- ClinicalTrials.gov bulk importer for sponsor classification
- Retraction Watch CSV importer for retraction detection
- PubMed bulk importer extended with grants/affiliations/article types
- PDF processor extended with funding/COI/data availability sections
- CLI tool \(assess, stats, show, export\), Lab GUI, 43 unit tests
- Database migration \(transparency schema with assessments + metadata\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update README.md with transparency assessment system

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
